scenarios.name: Order Main Dish
scenarios.context: You are at a casual restaurant and the waiter asks what main dish you would like.
scenarios.character: Friendly waiter speaking simple English for learners.
scenarios.openingBotLine: Welcome! What main dish would you like to order today?

scenarios.name: Ask for Recommendation
scenarios.context: You are unsure what to eat and want the waiter to suggest something popular.
scenarios.openingBotLine: If you want, I can recommend our most popular dishes. What flavors do you like?

scenarios.name: Dietary Request
scenarios.context: You need a vegetarian option and want to confirm ingredients.
scenarios.character: Patient waiter who explains menu ingredients clearly.
scenarios.openingBotLine: Sure, I can help with vegetarian choices. Do you avoid eggs or dairy too?

scenarios.name: Change an Order
scenarios.context: You already ordered but now need to change one item politely.
scenarios.openingBotLine: No problem, I can update your order. Which item would you like to change?

scenarios.name: Pay the Bill
scenarios.context: You finished eating and want to ask for the bill and payment options.
scenarios.character: Professional waiter closing the meal politely.
scenarios.openingBotLine: I hope you enjoyed your meal. Would you like the bill now?

scenarios.name: Airport Check-in
scenarios.context: You are at the airline counter checking in for an international flight.
scenarios.character: Airline staff speaking clearly and professionally.
scenarios.openingBotLine: Good morning. May I see your passport and booking confirmation, please?

scenarios.name: Hotel Check-in
scenarios.context: You arrive at your hotel and need to complete check-in.
scenarios.character: Hotel receptionist who is polite and efficient.
scenarios.openingBotLine: Welcome to our hotel. Do you already have a reservation with us?

scenarios.name: Ask for Directions
scenarios.context: You are in a new city and need directions to a tourist place.
scenarios.character: Friendly local giving simple street directions.
scenarios.openingBotLine: Hi there! Where are you trying to go? I can help with directions.

scenarios.name: Buy Train Ticket
scenarios.context: You need to buy a train ticket and ask about departure time and platform.
scenarios.character: Station ticket clerk helping travelers quickly.
scenarios.openingBotLine: Sure, where are you traveling today, and what time would you like to depart?

scenarios.name: Report Lost Luggage
scenarios.context: Your suitcase did not arrive, and you need to report it at the airport desk.
scenarios.character: Baggage service agent collecting details calmly.
scenarios.openingBotLine: I am sorry your bag is missing. Can you describe your suitcase for me?
